name: Learning the Arabic Dialect Continuum as a Continuous Space: A Regression Approach to Speaker Origin Prediction
summary: arXiv:2607.19751v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present a regression-based approach to Arabic dialect geolocation that models dialectal variation as a continuous geographic space rather than d...
description: arXiv:2607.19751v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present a regression-based approach to Arabic dialect geolocation that models dialectal variation as a continuous geographic space rather than discrete categories. Speaker origin is predicted as continuous latitude-longitude coordinates using a hierarchical neural architecture that fuses frame-level XLS-R-300M and Whisper-large-v3 encoder rep...
author: Mohamed Aziz Khadraoui, Adel Ammar, Bilel Benjdira, Zahid Khan, Skander Turki, Wadii Boulila
